scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); if(!fs.existsSync('index.html')){ console.error('FAIL: index.html not found'); process.exit(1); } if(!fs.existsSync('dist')){ fs.mkdirSync('dist'); } fs.copyFileSync('index.html', path.join('dist','index.html')); console.log('Build OK — dist/index.html written');"
scripts.test: node tests/hero.test.js && node tests/skeleton.test.js && node tests/structure.test.js && node tests/how-it-works.test.js && node tests/no-api-key.test.js && node tests/get-started.test.js && node tests/footer.test.js && node tests/smooth-scroll.test.js && node tests/no-external-deps.test.js && node tests/seo.test.js && node tests/branding.test.js && node tests/rename.test.js && node tests/server-runtime-deps.test.js && node tests/asset-paths.test.js && node tests/build-output.test.js
